message:
feat: add DataFrame API for fluent query building

Add DataFrame module providing chainable query interface:

- DataFrame.from(&table) - create from Table
- .select(columns) - project columns by name
- .filter(expr) - filter rows with expression predicate
- .groupBy(columns) - group for aggregation
- .orderBy(column, desc) - sort results
- .limit(n) / .offset(n) - pagination
- .collect() - execute and return ResultSet

Includes:
- GroupedFrame for aggregation operations (count, sum, avg, min, max)
- ExprBuilder for programmatic expression construction
- Integration with Table and query Executor via DataProvider vtable

Example usage:
  const df = DataFrame.from(allocator, &table)
      .select(&.{"id", "value"})
      .filter(try eb.gt(try eb.col("id"), try eb.int(10)))
      .orderBy("value", true)
      .limit(100);
  const result = try df.collect();
